extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL Warren attacked from the GC group on the final climb Col d'Izoard, caught 7-minute breakaway leader Atapuma inside 1km to win.
tactical_patterns: BARGUIL bridged 7-minute gap from GC group on final climb, revealing polka-dot leader had enormous watts in reserve.
BARDET Romain sprinted for 4-second bonus at finish with sub-1km attack, prioritizing time gaps over stage placing.
AG2R placed two riders in breakaway while keeping four for BARDET support, unusual dual-track resource allocation.
LANDA dropped in finale despite looking strongest early, suggesting he cracked on steepest pitches near summit.

rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: Best pure climber in race, not just consistent breakaway scavenger, can attack GC group and win.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: Strategically sprinted for time bonuses in finale, gained 4 seconds on URAN to move second overall.
rider_signals.ATAPUMA Darwin: positive: Held 7-minute lead until final kilometer on Colombian Independence Day, exceptional pacing under pressure.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Looked strongest early on climb but cracked before summit, fitness or positioning issue in critical moments.
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: negative: Lost 6 seconds to BARDET in time bonuses, showing vulnerability in tactical sprinting despite climbing well.
